meaning: v.(使)突出,(使)伸出,突击n.突出部分,伸出部分
examples: I'm jut a normal eleven-year-old kid.
Give longneck. Jut your neck out ever-so-slightly.
Scanning down from the jut of my chin to the tips of my toes, I've even managed to brand my feet.
Cubes jut from the walls over and into the surrounding garden and its stone walls.
Along the way, there are two 80-square-foot scholar rooms, which jut out from the staircase.
